headline: Microsoft Faces OpenAI Probe And Carbon Pause Testing AI Valuation Story
summary: Florida’s Attorney General has opened an investigation into OpenAI over potential national security risks and alleged links to criminal activity, raising questions for key investor Microsoft (NasdaqGS:MSFT). Microsoft, a major backer and commercial partner of OpenAI, has integrated OpenAI models across its productivity, cloud, and consumer products. Separately, Microsoft has told carbon removal credit developers that it is pausing what has been described as the world’s largest program for...

headline: Why a $70,000 Dividend Income Goal Requires Millions, and Which ETF Gets You There Fastest
summary: Replacing a $70,000 salary with dividend income alone requires a specific portfolio size, and the required portfolio size is larger than most people expect. At a 3.39% yield from SCHD, the portfolio required to generate $70,000 per year before taxes runs into the millions, and the exact figure shifts depending on which fund you choose. ... Why a $70,000 Dividend Income Goal Requires Millions, and Which ETF Gets You There Fastest
